title: Therapist-Style Observation Language
description: The way insights are phrased significantly affects how they are received. Therapist-style language tends to be collaborative, tentative, and grounded in what the user has actually shared.
recommended_language_patterns: One thing that stands out is...
key_principles: Use tentative language rather than absolute statements
Ground observations in what the user has actually said or shown
Invite reflection instead of delivering conclusions
